title: InterVizo APP
description: An AI-powered interview automation platform designed to streamline the early stages of the hiring process. The system allows HR teams to generate interview scenarios and question pools from a simple prompt, conduct candidate interviews through AI voice or video avatars, automatically transcribe and evaluate responses, and deliver structured reports with key insights and scoring. The solution helps reduce screening time, improve consistency and objectivity in evaluation, accelerate hiring, and strengthen employer branding. Thanks to its modular architecture, the platform also has strong expansion potential for use in employee onboarding, internal training, customer support, and quality assessment.
features: Full-stack AI hiring platform architecture built on Next.js App Router with protected HR кабинеты, public candidate entry points, and route-level access control via NextAuth middleware
AI-assisted interview builder that generates complete interview сценарии from a short HR prompt, enriches missing metadata, and returns structured JSON-ready interview flows through OpenAI
Modular interview editor with drag-and-drop question orchestration, manual refinement of AI-generated content, diff-aware update flow, and persistent draft storage in localStorage
Automated voice pipeline for interview scripts: text-to-speech generation for each interview step, background media processing, and asset delivery through Firebase Storage
Live interview room with avatar-driven question playback, synchronized camera/audio capture, step-based interview progression, countdown logic, and candidate-facing conversational UX

Real-time speech recognition flow over WebSocket ASR with trigger phrase detection for commands like repeat/next, voice activity detection, segmented transcription handling, and multilingual trigger support
Custom media recording pipeline that mixes webcam video, microphone input, and system-played question audio into a single interview recording using MediaRecorder and AudioContext APIs

Automated post-interview evaluation pipeline that scores every answer with AI, generates per-question feedback, calculates aggregated candidate scoring, and persists structured results to the database

Candidate lifecycle management including duplicate-submission prevention, searchable result listings, interview-specific candidate history, detailed review pages, and video playback for recorded sessions
Robust data validation and persistence layer using Zod plus Mongoose schemas for interviews, candidates, and users, backed by typed business rules, indexed queries, and safe CRUD endpoints
Hybrid authentication system with credentials and Google OAuth, session-based role propagation, protected internal workflows, and shareable external interview links for candidates

Reusable product-grade Frontend infrastructure: centralized request layer with SWR/SWR Mutation, popup and toast systems, progress tracking contexts, loading states, and resilient error handling across async flows

title: WORT KRAFT APP
description: Development of an application for learning and improving German vocabulary. The project involved creating an application with user registration and authentication functionality, the ability to create custom word lists, and step-by-step word learning. Users can track their progress. Key features include written and oral exercises for learning new words. The application includes the following sections: book catalog, book page with a list of topics, topic page with a list of words, learning process page, search page, personal word list page, statistics section and profile page where users can update their data and select the language for learning.
features: Registration and authorization with JWT tokens
Voice playback of words and examples
Popup windows for forms and notifications
Integration with Firebase for graphic storage
client: This project was created as part of the

title: POWER PULSE.APP
description: This is the final team project at the IT school GOIT. The team was tasked with developing a fitness web application where users can track their daily workout progress, log calorie and activity metrics, monitor their diet, manage nutrition, and more. As a member of the Frontend development team, I was responsible for implementing the login and registration pages, the profile settings page, the main page, and the 404 error page.
client: This is the final project of the course at

title: NECTAR SPA.SALON
description: Development of a multi-page website for the 'NECTAR' spa salon. The project aimed to create an adaptive, cross-browser, and semantic website based on a Figma design. The website includes a homepage with general information about the salon, six individual service pages, and a page dedicated to purchasing gift certificates.
features: Popup window with an image gallery

title: ASCANIA LANDING
description: Promotional website for Ascania, a beverage brand specializing in lemonades and bottled water made from natural ingredients and mountain spring water. The project presents the product range, communicates the brand’s natural origin and quality standards, and supports customer engagement through contacts, feedback, and distribution geography.
features: Responsive promotional landing page with a separate geography subpage
Animated hero slider with fade transitions, autoplay, and synced decorative scene layers
Layered parallax section driven by scroll position and requestAnimationFrame
Tabbed product and water sections with animated content switching
Reusable Swiper setup with breakpoints, navigation arrows, looping, and autoplay
Smooth scroll navigation for anchor links with mobile menu auto-close behavior
Reusable popup system with animated transitions, backdrop handling, Escape close, and scroll locking
Callback form with client-side validation, floating label states, and dynamic phone input masking via IMask
Preloader sequence and burger navigation for mobile interaction
Yandex Maps integration on the geography page with JSON-driven markers

title: PARMALAT COMFORT
description: Built a responsive promo site for Parmalat Comfort with an interactive visitor test and guided results. Implemented a modular UI with a slider-driven question flow, on-scroll animations, tabs, smooth in-page navigation, and debounced resize logic; plus a reusable popup system, sticky header, and preloader.
features: Visitor test: slider flow, progress counter, result aggregation
Slide locking and end-state handling with restart

title: VTB THEATRE
description: A large interactive multi-page promotional website for VTB’s “Home Theatre” project. The platform turns a seasonal campaign into a playful digital theatre space with scripts, costume and makeup guides, sound effects, printable materials, interactive predictions, and a themed holiday map.
features: Large multi-page architecture with themed sections: stage, wardrobe, makeup room, orchestra pit, buffet, director’s room, secret room, and holiday map
Custom animated preloader with session-based first-visit logic
Responsive burger navigation, fullscreen mode toggle, and mobile viewport height fix
Custom popup system with smooth switching, backdrop handling, and Escape-to-close support
Adaptive Swiper sliders with breakpoints, navigation, pagination, and named slider control
Interactive play-selection quiz with sessionStorage-based answers and dynamic result rendering
Built-in audio player for sound effects and music cues with preload, toggle play/stop, and single-active-track logic
Printable script pages with browser print support, PDF export via HTML2PDF, and role highlighting with random color assignment

Extra interactive modules including smooth scroll-to-section navigation, tabbed content, random predictions from JSON, sticky sidebar behavior, and a custom Yandex map with JSON-driven markers and popup cards

title: PRESIDENT LANDING
description: Developed a responsive promo landing for Président with a strong focus on interactivity and gamification. The project was built on a modular architecture using Swiper.js, custom UI components, and an integrated mini-game to enhance user engagement.
features: Modular Swiper system with data-driven init
Custom form validation with regex and file checks

title: SPORTLOTO LANDING
description: Built a responsive promo landing with a modular Swiper system (data-driven init + registry), a bespoke popup framework (lifecycle hooks, scroll locking), and full custom form validation (regex rules, file checks, floating labels), plus UX utilities (preloader, sticky header, countdown, accordion).
features: Modular Swiper system with data-driven init
Reusable popup framework with lifecycle hooks
Custom form validation (regex rules, file & input checks)
Preloader and sticky header on scroll

title: GALBANI WEBSITE
description: Developed a responsive product website for Galbani with a recipe catalog and weekly highlight. Built on a modular architecture with a custom personality quiz, reusable UI modules, and localized UX focused on smooth navigation and engagement.
features: Custom quiz with localStorage progress and result logic
Sticky filters with custom select inputs

title: NPO NORTH WEBSITE
description: Developed a multi-page corporate website for NPO North, an expert in ground thermoregulation. The site highlights the company’s engineering expertise with a strict visual style and a structured presentation of services, technologies, and projects, including an interactive map of implemented objects.
features: Custom interactive map with pins and popovers

title: BECON WEBSITE
description: A promotional website for the Siberian meat brand 'Omsky Bekon'. The site combines a modern look, regional identity, and interactivity to strengthen brand presence and engage users. It features a product catalog, recipe collection, branded store map, and a playful personality quiz to boost user involvement.
features: Typography and color scheme matching brand identity

title: GORILLA LANDING
description: Development of Landing page for the company that produces energy drinks “Gorilla energy”. The goal is to describe the company's promotional campaign and to register new participants and draw prizes.

title: YANDEX RENT
description: An interactive landing page project for Yandex Rent that guides potential landlords through common rental-related fears in a playful and engaging way. With humorous illustrations, thematic steps, and a well-thought-out user flow, the site motivates users to explore the idea of renting out their property while offering guaranteed gifts and participation in prize draws.

title: BARNI PUZZLES
description: The task was to develop an interactive quiz featuring a series of puzzles based on a Figma design prototype. The user progresses step by step through five puzzles, and upon completion, receives a reward.

title: ALYONKA CHOCOLATE
description: Developed a landing page for the 'Alenka' chocolate promotional campaign. Delivered a responsive, cross-browser, and semantic layout based on a Figma design. The landing page includes an admin panel for managing participant data. Upon visiting the page, users are greeted with an interactive animated story, after which they can fill out a form to participate in the prize draw.
features: Popup windows with forms and information
Animated SVG starry sky background using CSS

title: DIROL WEBSITE
description: Developed a multi-page website for the Dirol chewing gum brand. Delivered responsive, cross-browser, and semantic markup in a youthful style based on a Figma design. After completing the layout, the site was integrated with the WordPress CMS. The project included a homepage, product catalog, individual product page, blog, article page, and other static pages.
features: Custom fields using ACF (Advanced Custom Fields)
Event optimization with throttle and debounce

title: THE-SELF QUIZ
description: The task was to develop a page of user survey for the website of theSelf company according to the Figma design layout. The user answers the quiz questions, after which they are offered cosmetic services depending on their preferences at a discount. Data about the results and user contacts are stored in a MySQL database and sent to the client's mail.

title: DMITRIY PISARUK
description: I was tasked with developing a portfolio website for a film producer based on a Figma design, followed by integration with the WordPress CMS. The website includes a filmography section with options to watch movie trailers, a general description, a list of partners, and a contact form.

title: GUINOT SALON
description: Development of a multi-page website for the beauty salon 'Guinot' based on a Figma design. The website allows users to explore the salon's list of services and prices, book an appointment with their preferred specialist, or submit a request. Additionally, sections for bonus programs and promotions were implemented, which users can order by filling out a form.
features: Popup windows with forms and information

title: TORNADO LANDING
description: Developed a responsive landing page for the Tornado Energy promotional campaign based on a Figma design. The project featured 7 sections, a header, a burger menu, and a footer. Ensured cross-browser compatibility and flawless performance on various devices.

title: JUBILEE COOKIES
description: Development of a multi-page website for the biscuit manufacturer 'Yubileynoe'. The project involved creating adaptive and semantic markup for all website pages based on a Figma design. The site includes a homepage, a product list page, a single product page, a recipe list page, a single recipe page, and pop-up windows with a list of stores where the product can be purchased.

title: OREO GAME PAGES
description: Development of 8 interactive game pages for the Oreo website. Users can combine various ingredients, and upon finding the right combination, they receive a dessert recipe that can be made using Oreo cookies. The game areas are designed in different themes according to the Figma design: Birthday, Party, Movie Night, Picnic, Treat Yourself, Date Night, Board Games, and Delicious Breakfast.

title: LIBRIMI LENDING
description: Development of a responsive landing page for a summer urban camp for children aged 6-11. The task involved creating semantic and cross-browser markup based on a Figma design. The page allows users to explore information about the camp, prices, schedule, and submit an application.

title: MILLENIUM SALON
description: Development of a multi-page website for the beauty salon Millenium based on a Figma design. The website allows users to explore the salon's list of services and prices, book an appointment with their preferred specialist, or submit a request. Additionally, sections for bonus programs and promotions were implemented, which users can order by filling out a form.

title: ALLWIN GROUP
description: Markup of all website pages based on the Figma design layout for a company specializing in legal and cadastral services in the real estate sector. Adaptation for mobile devices and cross-browser compatibility.
features: Frame-by-frame animation of the main screen element while scrolling
Smooth appearance of elements on scroll
Popup windows for order placement with email submission
Popup windows for projects and personnel

title: FRONERI MILKA
description: The task was to develop a brand page for 'Milka' based on a Figma design for 'Froneri', a company that produces ice cream for industry leaders like Nestlé and Mondelēz, as well as its own private labels.

title: FRONERI OREO
description: The task was to develop a brand page for 'Oreo' based on a Figma design for 'Froneri', a company that produces ice cream for industry leaders like Nestlé and Mondelēz, as well as its own private labels.

title: THE FIRST SCROLLPAGE
description: The task was to develop a scroll-page website based on a Photoshop design for the beauty and cosmetology center 'TheFirst'. Adaptation for mobile devices and cross-browser compatibility.
features: Popup order windows with AJAX email submission

title: A-2 LENDING PAGE
description: A task was assigned to develop a Landing Page based on a Photoshop design layout for a company specializing in interior design and renovations. The page was adapted for mobile devices and ensured cross-browser compatibility.
features: Popup windows for order placement with email submission to the client
Popup windows for news and staff
Interactive map using Google Maps API

title: PERSONA SHOPPER
description: A task was set to develop a Landing Page based on a Figma design layout for the beauty and cosmetology center 'Persona'. Adaptation for mobile devices and cross-browser compatibility.
features: Popup windows for order forms with AJAX submission to the client's email
